title: Knee Pain Relief for Runners: 7 Herbal Cream Options
description: Zingiber officinale creams contain a compound called gingerol, which is responsible for its anti-inflammatory properties. These creams help with knee pain by reducing swelling and relieving discomfort. The active constituents in gingerol, such as 6-gingerol and 8-gingerol, have been shown to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes, which contribute to pain and inflammation.
